Manufacturer Account
New Inquiry
You've received
a new inquiry.
A buyer found your profile on SourceNest and reached out directly. This is a real business opportunity.
Dear Mehmet,

A buyer is interested in your products — this is a real opportunity to win business. They reviewed your profile specifically and chose to contact you directly through SourceNest.

JC
James Chen — Global Parts Co.
Buyer · Frankfurt, Germany
Today, 10:42 AM
Hello, we are looking for a reliable supplier of stainless steel fasteners in the M6–M20 range. We need samples before placing a monthly bulk order of approximately 50,000 units. Please advise on capacity, lead times, and sample availability…
Category Industrial HardwareVolume ~50K units/moStage Sample Request
Opportunity insight
This buyer selected your profile specifically. Responding within a few hours significantly increases your chances of winning this business.
How to write an effective reply
1
Address their specific requirements
This buyer asked about M6–M20 fasteners, sample availability, and capacity. Answer each point directly.
2
Include concrete production data
Monthly capacity, lead times for samples and bulk, and available specifications. Specific answers build trust.
3
Propose a clear next step
End with a specific action — a sample timeline, a product sheet, or an offer to discuss requirements.
Response tip
Keep your first reply to 150–250 words. Clear, specific, and professional. Brevity and precision stand out among supplier responses.
View Inquiry View all inquiries in your inbox →

SubjectPayment issue — action required to keep your account active
Payment Failed
Action Required
Payment failed —
action required.
We were unable to process your payment. Please update your payment details to avoid account suspension.
Dear Mehmet,

We attempted to process a payment for your SourceNest subscription but were unable to complete the transaction. If not resolved within 7 days, your account will be suspended and your profile will become invisible to buyers.

Payment Failed — Action Required
April 11, 2026
Account at risk
Your profile will be hidden from buyers and all incoming inquiries suspended if payment is not updated within 7 days. Act now to avoid any disruption.
Common reasons and how to fix
–
Expired or invalid card
Your card may have expired or the details on file may be incorrect. Update your payment method in account settings.
–
Bank block or insufficient funds
Your bank may have blocked the transaction. Contact your bank or try an alternative payment method.
–
Billing address mismatch
Ensure your billing address exactly matches the address registered with your bank or card provider.
Update Payment Details Contact billing support →

Account Security
Security Confirmation
Your password has
been changed.
This is your security confirmation. If this was you, no action needed. If not, act immediately.
Hello, Sarah.

Your SourceNest account password was successfully changed. You can now log in with your new credentials. This email is your official security record.

Security Event LogConfirmed
Event
Password changed
Account
sarah@yourcompany.com
Date & time
April 11, 2026 at 2:34 PM UTC+3
Device
Chrome 124 on macOS Sonoma
Location
Istanbul, Turkey (approximate)
Your account is secure
If the details above match your activity, everything is in order. Your account is protected by your new password.
Keep your account secure
1
Use a strong, unique password
At least 12 characters, not shared with other accounts. A password manager helps generate and store them securely.
2
Log out on shared devices
Always log out when using shared or public computers.
3
Recognise official communications
We only contact you from @sourcenest.com. We will never ask for your password by email, phone, or chat.
This wasn't you?
If you didn't change your password, your account may have been compromised. Reset your password immediately and contact support@sourcenest.com — we'll investigate as a priority.
Go to My Account
Need help? support@sourcenest.com

Review checklist
Verify business registration information
Confirm company name, registration country, and business details are complete and accurate.
Review product listings and categories
Ensure the manufacturer's products match the SourceNest platform scope for B2B suppliers.
Assess platform fit and approve or decline
Approve the registration to notify the manufacturer and move them to the payment step, or decline with a reason.
Action required
The manufacturer is currently in restricted preview mode and has no platform access. They will receive an approval or decline notification once you act on this registration.
